none.justification: Answer A exactly reports the 7 real src/t_string.c call sites at lines 128, 207, 543, 894, 1347, 1629, and 1630, and explicitly excludes the line 186 block-comment hit. It includes no out-of-scope references.

ccodegraph.justification: Answer B matches the GT list and count exactly, including all seven real call lines and the exclusion of the line 186 comment. The extra confidence/tooling claims are not needed, but they do not change the correctness of the reported references.

lsp.justification: Answer C includes all seven real call lines and excludes the line 186 comment, but it reports the total as 6 and merges lines 1629-1630 into one numbered item. Per the rubric, merging those two distinct lines while otherwise listing them is a minor but real counting/listing error.
